\tzpentry{ID3889}{Igammaomega Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3889 introduces Igammaomega Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \det\left[\omega^2\mathbb{I} - \mathcal{H}_{\text{total}} - i\gamma\omega\right] = 0 \end{equation}
